items.title: People are finally using Reddit’s search
items.description: The company saw a 30% year-on-year jump in the number of people using search every week, CEO Steve Huffman said on Thursday.

items.title: ChatGPT Images 2.0 is a hit in India, but not a big winner elsewhere, yet
items.description: Users in India are embracing ChatGPT Images 2.0 for creative, personal visuals — from avatars to cinematic portraits.

items.title: As Tim Cook steps down, Apple hit record sales — but a chip shortage looms
items.description: Cook warned that Apple is facing supply-chain headwinds from RAMageddon that could impact its business.

items.title: Y Combinator alum Skio sells for $105M cash, only raised $8M, founder says
items.description: Subscription billing fintech Skio sold to its competitor Recharge in what was a healthy exit, according to its founder and former CEO.

items.title: Sources: Anthropic potential $900B+ valuation round could happen within 2 weeks
items.description: Anthropic is asking investors to submit allocations for the AI company’s latest fundraise within the next 48 hours, according to sources familiar with the matter.

items.title: Apple was surprised by AI-driven demand for Macs
items.description: Apple said it will be supply-constrained on Mac mini, Studio, and Neo in the next quarter, too.
